texto: My books don’t narrate about delusions that people with unusual or forbidding looks should be treated as if they are not human beings
autor: that life finds its sense only in the midst of great sufferings and tribulations
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a that life finds its sense only in the midst of great sufferings and tribulations: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “My books don’t narrate about delusions that people with unusual or forbidding looks should be tre…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
